skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Completing the square and quadratic form
skills.description: Rewrite quadratic expressions and use completed-square form to identify roots, ranges and turning points.
common_errors: Incorrect sign inside the completed square
Forgetting to adjust the constant term
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Pure Mathematics 1, section 1.1
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Discriminants, roots and intersections
skills.description: Use the discriminant and algebraic intersections of lines and curves to classify real roots and tangency.
common_errors: Using the wrong inequality for two roots
Not forming the quadratic in one variable before using the discriminant
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Pure Mathematics 1, section 1.1

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Domain, range and one-one restrictions
skills.description: Determine domains, ranges and restrictions that make a function one-one.
common_errors: Giving the unrestricted range
Ignoring the stated domain when finding the range

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Composite and inverse functions
skills.description: Find and use composite functions and inverse functions, including solving equations involving them.
common_errors: Applying functions in the wrong order
Not restricting the domain before finding an inverse
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Pure Mathematics 1, section 1.2

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Graph transformations
skills.description: Describe and apply transformations of graphs including stretches, translations and reflections.
common_errors: Confusing horizontal and vertical stretch factors
Using the wrong sign for translations inside f(x)

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Straight lines, gradients and perpendicularity
skills.description: Use gradient, intercept, parallel and perpendicular line relationships in coordinate geometry.
common_errors: Using the same gradient for a perpendicular line
Dropping a negative reciprocal

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Circle equations, chords and tangents
skills.description: Find and use equations of circles, radii, tangents, chords and circle-line intersections.
common_errors: Forgetting to complete the square in both x and y
Using tangent length instead of radius perpendicularity

skills.name: Radians, arcs and sectors

Confusing arc length and sector area

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Segments, composite regions and perimeters
skills.description: Solve geometry problems involving sectors, segments, triangles and composite perimeters.
common_errors: Omitting straight boundary lengths
Using sector area where segment area is needed

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Basic identities and exact trigonometric values
skills.description: Use standard trigonometric identities and exact values in algebraic simplification.
common_errors: Dividing by an expression that may be zero
Mixing exact values and rounded decimals

Using degree mode for radian intervals or conversely

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Arithmetic progressions
skills.description: Use nth term and sum formulae for arithmetic progressions.
common_errors: Confusing common difference with common ratio
Using n instead of n minus 1 in the nth term

skills.name: Geometric progressions and sum to infinity
skills.description: Use nth term, finite sum and sum-to-infinity formulae for geometric progressions.
common_errors: Using the sum-to-infinity formula when |r| is not less than 1
Confusing r with d

skills.name: Binomial expansion for positive integer powers
skills.description: Expand binomial expressions with positive integer powers and use coefficients in linked products.
common_errors: Using too few terms for a linked coefficient
Dropping signs in negative terms

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Differentiation of powers and simple composites
skills.description: Differentiate powers and simple composite functions using the chain rule where appropriate.
common_errors: Reducing the power but not multiplying by the old power
Missing a chain-rule factor

skills.name: Tangents and normals

Not substituting the point after finding the gradient

skills.name: Stationary points, classification and rates of change
skills.description: Find and classify stationary points and solve simple rates-of-change problems.

Confusing dy/dt with dy/dx

skills.name: Reverse differentiation and constants

common_errors: Omitting the constant of integration
Substituting a point before integrating

skills.name: Definite integration, areas and volumes

Forgetting to square the radius for volume of revolution
